name: ai-context-pr-reviewer
description: Context-aware PR review engine that validates code changes against story acceptance criteria.

scripts.sample: node src/index.js --story stories/sample-story.json --diff test/fixtures/sample.diff --repo-root test/fixtures/repo --out review-report.md --json review-report.json
scripts.sample:llm: node src/index.js --story stories/sample-story.json --diff test/fixtures/sample.diff --repo-root test/fixtures/repo --llm-provider litellm --out review-report.md --json review-report.json
